title: Justicia debilis
intro: Justicia debilis, also known as Dwarf Shrimp Plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae. This plant is rich in various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of conditions such as fever, cough, and skin infections. The bioactive constituents of Justicia debilis include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Justicia debilis are infusions, decoctions, and extracts, often used to treat respiratory and skin disorders in traditional medicine.
taxonomy: Justicia debilis belongs to the family Acanthaceae, which is a group of flowering plants commonly known as the acanthus or thorny plants. This family consists of around 2,964 species across 320 genera. Justicia debilis is a species of flowering plant within the genus Justicia, which includes approximately 615 species. The genus Justicia is further categorized under the order Lamiales in the angiosperm classification. The classification of Justicia debilis reflects its evolutionary relationships with other plants in the Acanthaceae family.
